name: Grupo Security S.A.
summary: Grupo Security S.A., a diversified financial company, provides banking, insurance, asset management, and other services to large and medium-sized companies, and high-income individuals in Chile. The company provides commercial and retail banking, and factoring services. It also offers fund management, securities brokerage, asset management, and securitization services; and life and general insurance, as well as travel assistance and insurance brokerage services. In addition, the company engages in the development of real estate properties; and provision of travel agency, as well as technological development and business support services. Grupo Security S.A. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Santiago, Chile.
